code_dossier.name: UpdatePhoneRequest.java
code_dossier.description: A Data Transfer Object (DTO) used to encapsulate the request payload for updating a user's phone number in the account management system.

data.detailed_description:
This component is a simple Data Transfer Object (DTO) class located in the account-api module of a microservices-based account management system. It serves as a request payload container for phone number update operations.

The class leverages Lombok's @Data annotation to automatically generate boilerplate code including:
- Getter and setter methods for all fields
- toString() method
- equals() and hashCode() methods
- A default no-args constructor

The DTO contains two fields:
1. `userId` (Long): Identifies the user whose phone number needs to be updated
2. `newPhone` (String): The new phone number to be associated with the user account

This class follows the DTO pattern commonly used in layered architectures to transfer data between the API layer and service layer, particularly for REST API request handling. It belongs to the API module, indicating it's part of the public contract for the account management service.
responsibilities: Encapsulate phone update request data for API communication
Provide a type-safe contract for phone number update operations
Decouple API layer from internal domain models
Enable serialization/deserialization of phone update requests (JSON to Java object)
Serve as input validation target for phone update endpoint

interfaces.name: UpdatePhoneRequest
interfaces.description: DTO class for phone number update requests with auto-generated accessors via Lombok @Data annotation
